title: Full international SEO, site-wide localization, compare fix, multi-hit monsters
features: Full international SEO — localized detail pages for all entity types across 13 languages (~18,000 new URLs)
All 30+ pages now have /{lang}/ equivalents with 1:1 interactive experience (same components as English)
Language selector navigates between localized URLs — /cards/bash → /jpn/cards/bash
Navbar links stay in current language with translated group headers and link labels
UI translations for tabs (概要/詳細/情報), back links, section headings, page taglines, sort labels across all 13 languages
Home page sections use translated names with fallback chain: game translations → UI translations → English
Merchant page table rarity labels pulled from game translation API (e.g., Común/Poco común/Rara in Spanish)
Monster multi-hit attack display — hit counts extracted from C# WithHitCount(), shown as damage × hits = total
IndexNow expanded to ping all 19,397 URLs (including localized pages) in 2 batches per deploy
Kin Priest favicon and OG image (1200x630)
keywords_key field on cards for language-independent keyword matching
Sitemap expanded to ~19,300 URLs with all localized detail pages and hreflang alternates
fixes: Compare graphs now work in all languages — uses type_key, rarity_key, keywords_key instead of localized values
Monster ascension damage no longer shows 0 when no ascension variant exists (null vs undefined check)
Fixed ${gameName} showing literal dollar sign in JSX text on localized pages
HomeClient no longer falls back to English for sections the game returns untranslated (Characters, Enchantments, etc.)
Monster damage display cleaned up — pipe separator between normal/ascension, = for totals
Fixed small/placeholder monster sprites (fuzzy_wurm_crawler, gas_bomb, living_smog, thieving_hopper, etc.)
WebGL renderers now hide smokeTex/smoke_placeholder slots (removes Smoke Placeholder text)
Language context no longer defaults to English during navigation — URL path takes priority over localStorage on every render
api_changes: New field: keywords_key on Card schema — preserves English keyword names alongside localized keywords
New field: keywords_key added to card parser localization step
